site.title: Rizalde Martinez Jr. - Digital Media and IT Student
site.description: I'm a student at NAIT in the Digital Media and IT program, passionate about UX/UI design and front-end development. I enjoy creating visually appealing and user-friendly digital experiences. I'm eager to learn and grow in the field of digital media and IT, and I'm excited to share my journey and projects with you.

intro.summary: a Digital Media and IT student at NAIT with a passion for UX/UI design and front-end development

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Gianmarco, a front-end software developer from Italy.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, illustration, animation and 3D modelling and traveling. An unusual hobby of mine is collecting vintage passports, they're interesting pieces of history to me.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I always choose the best one for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. My goal is to find the right solution for each project.
